config.scxml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<scxml xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/07/scxml" xmlns:editor="http://vscxml.com/editor" version="1.0" datamodel="ecmascript" initial="operational" name="HamiltonSTAR_iSWAP">
  <datamodel>
    <data id="plate_gripped" expr="false"/>
    <data id="grip_width_01mm" expr="0"/>
    <data id="grip_force" expr="9"/>
    <data id="pos_x" expr="0"/>
    <data id="pos_y" expr="0"/>
    <data id="pos_z" expr="0"/>
    <data id="orientation" expr="'landscape'"/>
    <data id="last_error" expr="0"/>
  </datamodel>
  <state id="operational" initial="not_initialized" editor:x="12" editor:y="12" editor:width="1582" editor:height="459" editor:label="operational" editor:color="#1e2a3a" editor:zIndex="0">
    <state id="not_initialized" editor:x="1054" editor:y="198" editor:width="225" editor:height="75" editor:label="not_initialized" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="1">
      <transition target="parked" event="C0FI" editor:waypoints="1399,248;1399,212" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH55NDWASQD320DG4QAP">
        <assign location="plate_gripped" expr="false"/>
        <log expr="'Init iSWAP'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
    <state id="parked" editor:x="1402" editor:y="144" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="parked" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="2">
      <transition target="empty" event="C0FY" editor:waypoints="938,175;938,78;42,78;42,354;380,354;380,314" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH55WYV0T1H1D6QH0395">
        <log expr="'iSWAP free Y range'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
    <state id="ready" initial="empty" editor:x="60" editor:y="128" editor:width="503" editor:height="254" editor:label="ready" editor:color="#1e2a3a" editor:zIndex="3">
      <transition target="parked" event="C0PG" editor:waypoints="595,195;595,194" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH558FFHH8HNT1YRZG4R">
        <log expr="'iSWAP park'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <state id="empty" editor:x="323" editor:y="111" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="empty" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="4">
        <transition target="gripped" event="C0PP" editor:waypoints="360,276;360,253" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH562N3DKM43BF5EMKFA">
          <assign location="pos_x" expr="_event.data.xs || pos_x"/>
          <assign location="grip_width_01mm" expr="_event.data.yg || 0"/>
          <log expr="'iSWAP get plate'" label="FW"/>
        </transition>
        <transition target="empty" event="C0GF" editor:waypoints="373,101;423,101" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH56ABQ76YHWKAFNMGXA">
          <log expr="'iSWAP open gripper'" label="FW"/>
        </transition>
        <transition target="reading_barcode" event="C0PB" editor:waypoints="688,301;688,348" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH56KK35R8ZJ3PNAAMVB">
          <log expr="'iSWAP read barcode'" label="FW"/>
        </transition>
        <transition target="gripped" event="C0PO" editor:waypoints="360,289;360,285;287,285;287,264" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH56V2Z1991C2AMG5VS8">
          <log expr="'iSWAP get from hotel'" label="FW"/>
        </transition>
        <transition target="error_iswap" event="C0PR" editor:waypoints="595,276;595,248" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH566TF8GPRJDAWM5HJ8">
          <assign location="last_error" expr="22"/>
        </transition>
      </state>
      <state id="gripped" editor:x="30" editor:y="70" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="gripped" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="5">
        <onentry>
          <assign location="plate_gripped" expr="true"/>
        </onentry>
        <onexit>
          <assign location="plate_gripped" expr="false"/>
        </onexit>
        <transition target="empty" event="C0PR" editor:waypoints="277,274;277,317;360,317;360,301" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH567ET81B9T7D05A9V6">
          <log expr="'iSWAP put plate'" label="FW"/>
        </transition>
        <transition target="moving_plate" event="C0PM" editor:waypoints="267,221;267,185;595,185;595,154" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH56SH7BT72G0VN0PMZM">
          <assign location="pos_x" expr="_event.data.xs || pos_x"/>
          <log expr="'iSWAP move plate'" label="FW"/>
        </transition>
        <transition target="reading_barcode" event="C0PB" editor:waypoints="277,231;277,205;595,205;595,210;698,210;698,329" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH56ACVN2J352MW14XCD">
          <log expr="'iSWAP read barcode (held)'" label="FW"/>
        </transition>
        <transition target="empty" event="C0PI" editor:waypoints="287,242;287,221;370,221;370,264" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH56QJS4D2W3HB7D0DJK">
          <log expr="'iSWAP put to hotel'" label="FW"/>
        </transition>
      </state>
    </state>
    <state id="moving_plate" editor:x="711" editor:y="92" editor:width="200" editor:height="75" editor:label="moving_plate" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="6">
      <transition target="gripped" event="move_iswap.done" editor:waypoints="688,129;688,93;52,93;52,248" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH56KX2K9ZF37A6G0EFK"/>
    </state>
    <state id="reading_barcode" editor:x="711" editor:y="298" editor:width="225" editor:height="75" editor:label="reading_barcode" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="7">
      <transition target="ready" event="barcode.done" editor:waypoints="595,366;595,419;52,419;52,364" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH56Y0H93EGM5HZR97KZ"/>
    </state>
    <state id="error_iswap" editor:x="711" editor:y="198" editor:width="200" editor:height="75" editor:label="error_iswap" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="8">
      <onentry>
        <log expr="'iSWAP error ' + last_error" label="ERROR"/>
      </onentry>
      <transition target="not_initialized" event="C0FI" editor:id="t_01KP3PQH56T90H37KHKVFBPWZA">
        <assign location="last_error" expr="0"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
  </state>
</scxml>
